content:
💡 inksight | Jupyter Notebook
🎯 Primary Use Case: Digitizing physical handwritten notes into searchable and editable digital formats.
✨ Key Features: • Offline-to-online handwriting conversion from photos • Multi-language support • Robust background handling • Word-level and full-page text processing • Vector-based digital ink output
📖 Summary: InkSight is a system that converts photos of handwritten text into editable digital ink. It uses a Vision Transformer and mT5 architecture to process diverse handwriting styles and backgrounds, supporting both word-level and full-page conversion for practical digitization.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
